author.bio: Obsessed with Knowledge, Science, and Technology -- Protocol Labs, IPFS, Filecoin -- http://juan.benet.ai
author.name: Juan Benet

content.text:
Excellent post from @dietrich on how android @opera added ipfs:// resolution by default, and what it means for the web. 

Major milestone for ipfs, web3, decentralization!

Covers name resolution w/ @ensdomains, @unstoppableweb, DNS, gateways, and how you can get involved 🎉🚀
content.html:

author.bio: A lifestyle brand offering timeless products of unique modernity. @ipfsbot at @protocollabs
author.name: dietrich

content.text:
Today @opera released ipfs:// support in their Android browser, on by default.

For the first time, a major browser will load verifiable content without making the user specify which server to get it from.

Huge milestone for P2P, the dweb and @IPFSbot.

https://blog.ipfs.io/2020-03-30-ipfs-in-opera-for-android/
